scripts.db:up: docker compose up -d --wait && bun prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:dev: docker compose up -d --wait && bun prisma migrate deploy && bun prisma db seed
scripts.db:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d --wait && bun prisma migrate deploy && bun prisma db seed
scripts.test: bun test tests/unit/auth tests/unit/middleware tests/unit/workspace tests/unit/issues tests/unit/tabbar && bun test tests/unit/session
scripts.test:coverage: bun test --coverage tests/unit/auth tests/unit/middleware tests/unit/workspace tests/unit/issues tests/unit/tabbar && bun test --coverage tests/unit/session
